title: Investment Manager
description:
About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Investment Manager to join our investment advisory team, focusing on deep tech, AI, and digital assets. You will lead investment sourcing, evaluation, and execution, while contributing to portfolio strategy and monitoring.

This role offers hands-on exposure to both private and public equity investment opportunities, providing the chance to drive high-impact decisions and collaborate directly with founders, portfolio companies, and institutional partners.


Key Responsibilities


Investment Research & Strategy

•Conduct in-depth research on companies, industries, and emerging technologies across deep tech, AI, semiconductors, cybersecurity, FinTech, and digital assets

•Develop thematic insights and long-term investment strategies

•Identify market trends and disruptive innovations shaping future economies


Deal Sourcing & Execution

•Source, evaluate, and recommend private and public investment opportunities

•Lead financial modeling, valuation analysis (DCF, multiples, comparable analysis), and scenario testing

•Manage due diligence processes, investment memos, and presentation to the investment committee

•Negotiate terms and structure deals in collaboration with legal and finance teams


Portfolio Management

•Monitor portfolio company performance, financials, and strategic initiatives

•Support operational improvements, capital strategy, and exit planning (M&A, IPO, secondary transactions)

•Analyze risk and return across the portfolio to inform allocation decisions


Capital & Ecosystem Engagement

•Build relationships with founders, co-investors, institutional LPs, and industry partners

•Contribute to fundraising initiatives, investor reporting, and product strategy


Requirements

•Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Economics, Engineering, Computer Science, Business, or a related field

•Minimum 3–5 years of experience in private equity, venture capital, hedge funds, investment banking, or technology strategy

•Strong understanding of financial statements, valuation techniques, and capital markets

•Proven experience in deal sourcing, due diligence, and investment execution

•Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint; familiarity with Python, SQL, or data analysis tools is advantageous

•Excellent communication skills in English and Chinese, with strong presentation capabilities

•Analytical, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, dynamic environment


What You’ll Gain

•Lead investment decisions in deep tech and digital asset sectors

•Exposure to both public and private market investing strategies

•Opportunity to collaborate with top founders, engineers, and institutional partners

•Strategic involvement in portfolio management and fund development

•Potential pathway to senior leadership or partner roles within the firm


How to Apply

Please submit your CV, cover letter, recent photo and relevant investment case studies or research samples to zhuyingying@dojane.com.cn

postedCompany.description:
Grandbull Network Technology, part of the Dojane Capital Group, is a next-generation investment advisory firm focused on deep technology, artificial intelligence (AI), and emerging digital asset ecosystems.


We are committed to supporting our investment teams with accurate, efficient, and transparent administrative and operational processes, ensuring smooth execution of investment strategies across public and private markets.

Grandbull Network Technology 隶属于 Dojane Capital Group（道杰资本集团），是一家专注于深度科技、人工智能（AI）以及新兴数字资产生态系统的新一代投资顾问公司。

我们致力于为投资团队提供精准、高效且透明的行政与运营支持，以确保在公开市场与私募市场中的各类投资策略能够顺利执行、稳健落地。
postedCompany.name: GRANDBULL NETWORK TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
